embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
